before.case_identity: raw IDs compared directly; repeat suffixes could distort canonical matching
before.coverage_calculation: non-canonical and repeated traces could inflate interpretation
before.gate_behavior: allowed contradictory pass signals in historical audited runs

after.case_identity: canonical IDs normalized (including repeat suffix handling)
after.coverage_calculation: canonical expected set intersection used for coverage metrics
after.gate_behavior: strict gate now fails on canonical_coverage quality and provenance anomalies
